text:
Scheme: HDFC Large Cap Fund | Section: Overview
The application form/transaction slip for subscription/ redemption/ switches can be submitted at our Official Points of Acceptances whose addresses are available on the website of the AMC. These include:
AMC / RTA’s branches i.e. Investor Services Centres*
HDFC MF website and App/ RTA website for Investors to transact
MFSS/BSE StAR MF/NMF II platforms of the Stock Exchanges(s)
Authorized Points of Service of MF Utilities India Private Limited (MFUI)
